L

Bright Sentinel

System / Location · First seen 3308-06-30 · 18 mentions
Active: 3308-06-30 → 3309-12-11
System Overview

The Bright Sentinel is a megaship operated by Taurus Mining Ventures that became a mobile hub for anti-xeno technology distribution during the Thargoid conflicts of the late 3300s. In October 3307, the vessel relocated to the Merope system at Salvation's request, with tech brokers on board offering a Guardian-hybrid plasma charger and material cost discounts to support independent pilots fighting the Thargoid invasion.

The megaship's deployment came during a critical period when Aegis was hobbled by the operational shutdown enforced by the Baumann Report public inquiry, leaving a vacuum in coordinated anti-xeno defence. The Bright Sentinel represented one of several corporate and independent efforts to fill that gap, though its close association with Salvation later drew scrutiny as the scientist's true identity and methods became increasingly controversial.

Mentions Timeline (18 articles)
3309-12-11
Utopia Shares Update on Nemesis Failsafe
Pranav Antal discusses Utopia's analysis of Salvation's Nemesis Failsafe schematics, inviting Seo Jin-ae to collaborate while dismissing claims of Utopia's involvement.
3309-03-30
Seo Jin-ae: 'I Believe Salvation Survived'
Seo Jin-ae claims Salvation planned to escape death via the Nemesis Failsafe, a Guardian-based consciousness transfer technology, while the Order of the Far God megaship that rescued her departs Luyten's Star.
3309-03-20
Rumours Circulate Around Seo Jin-ae
Rumors suggest Seo Jin-ae has been kidnapped or assassinated; Aegis is investigating, while Azimuth claims she has 'dissociative disorder and paranoid delusions.'
3308-11-03
Azimuth to Expand Operational Assets
Azimuth Biotech has announced a campaign in the Wandrama system to expand its military and surface facility capacity.
3308-08-25
Report from HIP 22460: Salvation is Dead
An independent rescue team confirms that Salvation, identified as Dr Caleb Wycherley, was killed aboard the Bright Sentinel in HIP 22460, found dead in his command chair surrounded by shattered cybernetic implants.
3308-08-09
Contact Lost after Proteus Wave Fired
Communication with all ships in HIP 22460 terminates after the Proteus Wave's activation, as a second unknown energy pulse disables the Bright Sentinel and Thargoid vessels regain function, leaving thousands stranded.
3308-07-26
Guardian Artefact Campaign Concludes
The third phase of Guardian artefact deliveries for the Proteus Wave concludes successfully, with Commodore Morag Halloran announcing the core mechanism is days away from full assembly on HIP 22460 10b.
3308-07-21
Proteus Wave Approaches Completion
Salvation announced the Proteus Wave core mechanism would be fully constructed within a week. Federal and Imperial capital ships reinforced HIP 22460 as Thargoid presence escalated. Pilots destroying Thargoids could obtain pre-engineered Guardian gauss cannons.
3308-07-19
Azimuth's Final Call for Guardian Artefacts
Azimuth Biotech issues its final call for Guardian artefacts to complete the Proteus Wave superweapon in HIP 22460, with Commodore Morag Halloran warning of increased Thargoid activity around the Bright Sentinel.
3308-07-14
Pilots Urged to Defend Proteus Wave Project
Azimuth calls for reinforcements to defend the Proteus Wave after saboteurs delay construction and Thargoid attacks intensify.
3308-07-13
The Battle of HIP 22460
Vox Galactica reports from the front lines as coalition forces battle Thargoid swarms while Salvation's superweapon nears completion.
3308-07-12
Guardian Artefact Initiative Enters Second Phase
Azimuth Biotech extends its Guardian artefact delivery campaign as the Proteus Wave requires increasing quantities of Guardian technology.
3308-07-08
Thargoids Launch Attack in HIP 22460
Thargoid forces invade HIP 22460 in response to the concentration of Guardian artefacts aboard the Bright Sentinel.
3308-07-07
HIP 22460 Receives Vital Supplies
Commodore Halloran confirms delivery of vital supplies to HIP 22460 and urges continued support for the Proteus Wave construction.
3308-07-07
The Salvation Stratagem
Salvation reveals the Proteus Wave's strategy of using Guardian artefacts to lure Thargoids to HIP 22460 for annihilation.
3308-07-05
Guardian Artefacts Needed to Power Superweapon
Azimuth Biotech launches a campaign requesting Guardian artefacts to complete construction of the Proteus Wave superweapon.
3308-06-30
Salvation Prepares 'Final Thargoid Battlefield'
Salvation announces the Proteus Wave construction in HIP 22460, declaring it will be the final battlefield to eradicate Thargoids from the galaxy, with superpower navies and Azimuth megaships mobilising for the operation.
3308-06-30
Urgent Request for Supplies in HIP 22460
Azimuth Biotech requests medical and military commodity deliveries to the Heart of Taurus in HIP 22460 to support Proteus Wave construction and defend against anticipated Thargoid fleets.
